author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Crew Packs Airdrop - LIVE

Hey everyone, you should have your Crew Packs airdrop in your https://play.staratlas.com/ inventory now!  

Go to https://play.staratlas.com/,Connect your wallet,Click the Inventory icon on the left sidebar,Claim your airdrops!,Open your packs tomorrow,
The Ship Component Bundles will be done in a separate airdrop soon, we wanted to make sure to get these packs out to you before the release tomorrow. This is what your airdrop should look like (With different numbers of course)
